runs.text: If there's one thing we hope you took away from the session, is that stress-free cycle prep doesn't start with a total overhaul. It starts with smart, manageable changes that make a big difference.

runs.text: These quick wins will help you simplify your email process, improve consistency, and save time (without the added stress).
Set up your brand guidelines within your workspace so your fonts, colors, and logo are just a click away. With Beefree, this is as easy as
copy and pasting a link.
Browse through your previous emails: Are there any content block that you reuse often? If so,
